privileged_info_summary: The fix_build_errors task requires fixing a Maven project with missing joda-time dependency. The HelloWorld.java source file imports org.joda.time.LocalTime, which causes compilation errors until the dependency is added. The reference working project (gs-maven) includes this exact dependency specification. The test data is synthetic, created specifically for this task.
